folio.label: 152r
folio.l: For on my Portos , I make an otú
That neuäe in my lyf , for lief ne lootú
Ne shal I of no counseile , ©ow bewreye
¢ The same a geyn q¶ she , to ©ow I seye
By god and by this Portos , I swere
Thougú men me wolde , al in peces tere
Ne shal I neuäe , for to gon to helle
Bywreye a word , of thyngö that ©e me telle
Nougút for no Cosynage , ne alliaunce
But verrayly for loue , and affiaunce
¢ Thus ben they sworn , and here vp on they kiste
And eche of hem , told other what hem liste
Cosyn quod she , if that I hadde a space
As I haue noon , and , namely in this place
Tha~ne wolde I telle , a legende of my lif
What I haue suffred , sithe I was a wyf
Witú myn housbonde , al be he ©oure Cosyn
¢ Nay q¶ this Monk , by god and Seynt Martyn
He is no more , Cosyn vn to me
Than is this lef , that hangetú on the tre
I clepe hi~ so , by Seynt Denys of Fraunce
To han the more cause , of aqueyntaunce
Of ©ow , whicú I haue loued specialy
A bouen alle wommen , sikerly
This swere I now©own©ow , on my professioun
Telletú ©oure grief , lest that he come a doun
And hastetú ©ow , and gotú a wey a noon
¢ My dere loue q¶ she , o myn Daun Ioún
Ful lief were me , this counseil for to hide
But out it mot , I may no lengere a bide
Myn husbonde is to me , the werst man
That euäe was , sithe that the world bygan
But sithe I am a wif , it syt nat me
To tellen no wygút , of oure pryuyte
Neither a bedde , ne in noon other place
God shilde I shulde it telle , for his grace
A wif ne shal nat seyn , of hire housbonde
But al honour , as I can vnderstonde
Saue vn to ©ow , thus meche I tellen shal
As helpe me god , he is nougút wortú at al
In no degree , the value of a flye
But ©et me greuetú moste , his nygardye
And wel ©e wot , that wo~men naturely
Desiren thynges , sexe , as wel as I
